hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs your attention', 'Claude Code')"

powershell.exe -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path backups | Out-Null; $count = (Get-ChildItem backups -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Count + 1; $num = $count.ToString('D3'); $date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $dest = 'backups/' + $num + '_' + $date; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Exclude backups | Copy-Item -Destination $dest -Recurse; Write-Host '자동 백업 완료'"
